title: Manual reference recovery
intro: If you did not provide email or phone when submitting, describe your complaint so MoPD staff can locate it. Staff review is not instant — provide an email where we can send your reference number or the outcome.

fields.subjectFragmentHint: Enter at least 5 characters describing what your complaint was about.
fields.submittedDateEthiopianHint: Use the Ethiopian calendar date if you remember it.
fields.contactEmailHint: We will email you when staff resolve this request (may take several business days).
fields.additionalNotesPlaceholder: Any other details that might help staff locate your complaint…

successBody: Check your email for a confirmation. When staff finish reviewing, we will email you at the address you provided.

errors.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 5 characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait about an hour and try again, or use a different email if you were testing the form.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit your request. Try again.
